prevalence.trend: increasing with obesity and sedentary lifestyle

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; increases risk of diabetes and CVD

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: IDF or NCEP ATP III criteria (waist, BP, glucose, triglycerides, HDL)

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low; lifestyle adherence and access to counseling limit control

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care screening for BP, glucose, lipids, and waist circumference
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Lifestyle modification, weight loss, BP/lipid control, diabetes prevention programs
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to structured lifestyle programs and high obesity prevalence
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Large-scale NCD programs and affordable generics
